name: Hospice Care Codes
description: Codes indicating hospice care enrollment or encounter. Used as a global exclusion across most HEDIS measures — members in hospice are typically excluded from quality measure denominators.
source: Public CMS/clinical references — placeholder for official NCQA value sets

codes.description: Encounter for therapeutic drug level monitoring
Physician supervision of hospice patient, 15-29 minutes
Physician supervision of hospice patient, 30+ minutes
Physician certification of patient for Medicare-covered home health services
Services performed by chaplain in the hospice setting
Services performed by dietary counselor in the hospice setting
Hospice routine home care; per diem
Hospice continuous home care; per diem
Hospice inpatient respite care; per diem
Hospice general inpatient care; per diem
